message:
fix: suppress human output for sync subcommands under --quiet flag

Add suppress_human_sync_output helper that gates non-JSON human output
behind the quiet flag for status, flush, import, and merge paths.
Adds e2e tests for --quiet sync subcommands. Also removes leftover
debug eprintln lines from the changelog e2e test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
